description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, testing, and cleanup. In the build stage add a build job that runs `docker-compose down`, `docker volume prune -f`, and `docker-compose build`. In the testing stage add a testing job (retry up to 2 times) that runs `docker-compose up -d` followed by `docker-compose exec -T cidemon python test_app.py`. In the cleanup stage add a cleanup job that always runs, executing `docker-compose down`, `docker volume prune -f`, and `docker rm -f $(docker ps -qa) || echo ""`. Use the default Docker image to run these commands.
